title: Barcelona, Catalonia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Barcelona is a city in Catalonia with a population of 1,636,000. A Mediterranean gem with Gaudí’s masterpieces, vibrant street life, sandy beaches, and a world-class culinary scene.

Last updated: July 11, 2026
